title: Cell viability using Calcein
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5urhk","text":"This protocol measures the viability of cells within a spheroid after dissociation.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"2l09s","text":"Spheroids","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8625a","text":"DPBS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"el3mq","text":"Accumax (SCR006 sigma-aldrich)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bvl3f","text":"24-well plate cell-repellent\nfor culture (Greiner Bio-one 662970)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"crl1l","text":"Calcein AM-blue (c1429 Invitrogen)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"brnuf","text":"agitator incubator\n(Incu-shaker)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3dbms","text":"Flow cytometer (Fortessa)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: -Place spheroids in a 24-well cell repellent plate, pooling 8spheroids in a well.
Incubateplate at 37°C in incu-shaker at 200rpm for 1h30, flushing regularly (45' +45'for hearts/crowns).
- Add 500µl /tube of DPBS - suspend cells -centrifuge again - discard supernatant
- Incubate for 15 min in the dark
creator: magali perier
